title: 風景下的追憶
lyrics_text:
[verse]
在舊歲夜的風中輕搖
燈下影子的柔光
曾經的笑語呢喃如夢一般遠去
[chorus]
那段日子再也回不來了
那些快樂如今化為煙火
[end]
genre_prompt: female Cantonese Melancholic Classical airy vocal Piano bright vocal Pop Nostalgic Violin
lyrics_format_warnings: ["Missing blank line before [chorus] at line 5.", "Missing blank line before [end] at line 8.", "Section [verse] has 3 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 2 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [verse] has 3 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 2 lyric lines; expected 4."]
quality_suggestions: ["押韻：確保行末字韻母相近，建立一致的押韻密度。", "連貫性：加入重複副歌段落以強化整體結構感。"]
